items.name: Open Terminal
items.description: Open Command Prompt in a target folder.

items.name: Run CMD
items.description: Execute a cmd.exe command and capture its output.

items.name: Open Browser
items.description: Open a URL in the default browser.

items.name: Download File
items.description: Download a file from the internet to a target path.

items.name: Git Clone
items.description: Clone a git repository into a target folder.

items.name: List Processes
items.description: Return the current Windows process list.

items.name: Search Files
items.description: Search for files by name under a root folder.
